description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage containing four jobs. In the "java 0 3" job (stage test) use the openjdk:11-jdk image, run "apt-get update && apt-get install -y ant", then "cd junit-example" and "ant test", and publish the JUnit report at junit-example/TEST-CalculatorTest.xml as an artifact. Add three rspec jobs ("rspec 0 3", "rspec 1 3", "rspec 2 3") also in the test stage; each runs "bundle install" followed by "bundle exec rspec <spec_path> --format RspecJunitFormatter --out rspec.xml" where the spec paths are spec/test_spec.rb, spec/string_helper_spec.rb, and spec/hash_scan_spec.rb respectively, and each uploads rspec.xml as a JUnit artifact. No caches, services, variables, or conditional rules are defined.
